'''Tromonids''' were creatures, native to the planet [[Rywin]], imbued with a fatal bite. [[Standard month/Legends|Months]] after their discovery, they infested five planets due to their high [[Reproduction/Legends|reproduction]] rate. At one time, [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] dealt with [[Gaar (title)|Gaar]] [[Suppoon]] where one of these creatures was a trade item. Later, Jabba found, with a gleam of rage, that Suppoon had actually given him a sterile member of the species. Jabba later released the creature, which bit Suppoon. The Hutt, of course, used the situation to his advantage, forcing Suppoon to give him all his trade items in exchange for a cure.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Gaar Suppoon Hit]]'' {{1st}}
